summary: Iteration 2 delta verification (Cent Pro + cyan theme + Rupee coin + SendGrid dev fallback). Backend: 46/46 pytest cases pass (11 new billing/pro tests + 35 regression). Frontend: full landing → signin → OTP → onboarding → /pro flow verified on 390x844 mobile viewport. 3D metallic-gold Rupee coin renders on landing (5 SVGs, 0 phone images); 'Learn more.' is cyan; Verify button computed background is rgb(6,182,212) = #06B6D4 confirming full pink→cyan repaint. /pro screen renders correctly: 6 feature rows with checkmarks, 2 plans, yearly selected by default with BEST VALUE badge, CTA shows 'Upgrade for ₹899', tapping monthly card flips selection and CTA to 'Upgrade for ₹99'. 'Skip payment (test mode)' activates Pro via /api/Billing/mock-activate → status pill '🎉 Welcome to Cent Pro! (test mode)', gold 'You're Pro · Monthly' badge appears, /Auth/me returns is_pro:true. Profile screen 'Cent Pro · Active / monthly plan' banner renders in gold; card now navigates to /pro. /api/Billing/checkout with placeholder sk_test_emergent correctly returns 500 'Checkout failed'. /api/Billing/status with fake session returns 400. Email OTP still returns devOTP when SENDGRID_API_KEY is empty (no crash). No React Native red screens; no new deprecated packages.

issues: Tab labels still appear truncated/small on 390px width (carry-over from iteration 1 — not fixed this iteration).

action_items: (Optional / carried from iteration 1) Fix bottom tab bar label truncation on narrow viewports.
(Optional / carried from iteration 1) OTP box overflow on 390px width — the flow works because devOTP autofills but visual polish is needed.
When SENDGRID_API_KEY is provided later, retest the /api/Auth/login email branch to confirm the SendGrid delivery path (currently only the empty-key dev fallback is exercised).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~986 lines — still above the 700-line guideline. Consider splitting into routers (auth, billing, txn, ai, groups).
/api/Billing/mock-activate is correctly gated by STRIPE_API_KEY.startswith('sk_test') — remove or re-check this guard before switching to a live Stripe secret key.
landing.tsx cleanly uses testID='landing-title' and RupeeCoin3D component; theme primary is centralized at theme.ts line 10 (#06B6D4).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_billing_pro.py (new — 11 tests for SendGrid fallback + Billing plans/checkout/status/mock-activate)
seed_data_creation: Ephemeral TEST_<uuid>@centsible.dev users created for each mock-activate test. No cleanup (isolated by user_id).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration-2 features verified end-to-end. Cyan/gold theme applied globally (primary=#06B6D4 confirmed via computed style). 3D Rupee coin renders as SVG on /landing. Cent Pro screen at /pro is fully wired to backend Billing endpoints. Mock activation flow works and reflects in /Auth/me. Live Stripe checkout will only work once a real Stripe secret key replaces sk_test_emergent — placeholder correctly triggers 500 today. Pending polish items from iteration 1 (tab label truncation, OTP box overflow on 390px) were NOT re-tested and remain open.
